examples:
!claroty-get-single-alert alert_rid="75-1"
Context Example
#
{
"Claroty.Alert": {
"Category": "Integrity",
"NetworkID": 1,
"Indicator": "Alert ID - 75\r\nDescription - This Event does not currently support Alert Indicators\r\nPoints - 100\r\n\n",

outputs.description: The alert type. Claroty.Alert.AlertTypeID The alert type int value
outputs.name: Claroty.Alert.AlertType

outputs.description: The alert description. Claroty.Alert.Indicator The alert indicators.
outputs.name: Claroty.Alert.Description

outputs.description: The network ID. Claroty.Alert.RelatedAssets Assets related to the alert.
outputs.name: Claroty.Alert.NetworkID

outputs.description: The resolve status of the alert. Claroty.Alert.ResourceID The alert resource ID (AlertID-SiteID).
outputs.name: Claroty.Alert.Resolved
